title: geum × macneillii
intro: Geum × macneillii, a hybrid species of the geum genus, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Western Europe. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine, valued for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Geum × macneillii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
